hero.headline: Three Generations of Pool Perfection
hero.subheadline: Alec's Pool Service brings decades of family expertise to every backyard in Rancho Cucamonga. We treat your pool like our own and your family like ours — because that's how we were raised.
checkmarks: Fair, transparent pricing — no surprise fees

services.headline: Pool Services Built on Family Trust
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to complex repairs, our three generations of knowledge mean we get it right the first time.

cards.title: Monthly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly cleaning, skimming, brushing, and chemical balancing that keeps your pool crystal clear and swim-ready every single day.

cards.title: Pool & Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and plumbing — often catching problems other companies miss entirely.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of new pumps, filters, salt systems, heaters, and automation to modernize and upgrade your pool.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Thorough pre-purchase and seasonal startup inspections so you know exactly what shape your pool system is in.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing tailored to Inland Empire water conditions, preventing scale, algae, and equipment damage.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Prep
cards.description: Spring opening and winterization services to protect your investment and ensure your pool is ready when you are.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call or text us at 909.527.0737. We'll come out, inspect your pool, and give you an honest recommendation — no pressure.

steps.title: Get a Straightforward Plan
steps.description: We'll create a customized service plan with clear, fair pricing. No hidden fees, no upsells — just what your pool actually needs.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool Worry-Free
steps.description: Relax knowing a 3rd generation pool family is keeping your water perfect. We handle everything so you just enjoy swimming.

about.label: About Alec's Pool Service
about.headline: Three Generations of Pool Knowledge, One Family's Promise
about.description: Alec's Pool Service is a 3rd generation family-owned company serving Rancho Cucamonga, Upland, and Alta Loma. The knowledge passed down through our family over decades means we bring unmatched expertise to every pool we touch. We built this business on a simple promise: treat every client like family, charge fair prices, and never cut corners. That's what our grandfather taught our father, and what our father taught us.

features.title: 3rd Generation Expertise
features.description: Family expertise passed down through 3 generations means we bring unmatched knowledge to every pool we service.

features.title: Licensed & CPO Certified
features.description: Our technicians are fully licensed, insured, and CPO certified — you can trust us with your pool and your property.

features.title: Deep Local Knowledge
features.description: We understand Inland Empire water conditions, climate patterns, and common pool issues specific to this region.

pricing.headline: Fair, Transparent Pool Service Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No contracts required. No hidden fees. Just honest pricing from a family that values long-term relationships over quick profits.

guarantee.headline: Our Family's Promise to Yours
guarantee.description: If you're ever unhappy with our service, we'll come back and make it right — free of charge. We've built our reputation on trust over three generations, and we're not about to break that now. Your satisfaction isn't just a policy; it's a family value.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Rancho Cucamonga, Upland, Alta Loma, Ontario, Fontana, and surrounding Inland Empire communities. If you're unsure whether you're in our service area, just give us a call.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: No. We earn your business every month with great service, not with contracts. You're free to cancel anytime — though our clients tend to stay with us for years because we treat them like family.

faqs.question: How often will you service my pool?
faqs.answer: Our standard maintenance plan includes weekly service visits. During each visit, we skim, brush, vacuum, empty baskets, check equipment, and balance your water chemistry.

faqs.question: What makes you different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We're a 3rd generation pool family. The knowledge and techniques passed down through our family over decades give us an edge in diagnosing problems and maintaining pools that other companies simply don't have.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to repair emergencies?
faqs.answer: We prioritize existing clients for emergency repairs and typically respond within 24-48 hours. For urgent situations like major leaks or pump failures, we do our best to get there same-day.

testimonials.name: Michael R.
testimonials.text: Alec and his team have been maintaining our pool for over two years now. The water is always crystal clear and he is very responsive whenever we have questions or issues. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Sarah T.
testimonials.text: Third generation pool knowledge really shows. They diagnosed a leak that two other companies missed and fixed it at a fair price. Honest and reliable service.

testimonials.name: David L.
testimonials.text: We switched to Alec's Pool Service after a bad experience with another company. Night and day difference. They treat us like family and our pool has never looked better.

contact.headline: Let's Talk About Your Pool
contact.subtitle: Whether you need weekly maintenance, a repair, or just honest advice — we're here to help. Reach out and experience the family difference.
benefits: Friendly, knowledgeable team ready to help

footer.description: Alec's Pool Service is a 3rd generation family-owned pool company serving the Inland Empire with honest, reliable pool care since 2019.
footer.service_area: Rancho Cucamonga, Upland, Alta Loma, Ontario, Fontana & the Inland Empire
